== Scope

This part specifies bolts. The terms it relies on are defined in <<part1>>.

[bibliography]
== Normative references

* [[[part1,repo:(current-metanorma-collection/toy,ISO 99000-1:2024)]]]

== Bolt requirements

A bolt is a threaded fastener, as defined in <<part1>>.
